CustomField.description: Automatically updated by the system based on the values in the fields Asset (leaseworks__Aircraft__c) and New/Used? (leaseworks__New_Used__c), as follows: 'New' => Asset->Date of Manufacture, 'Used' => Asset->Lease->Lease End Date. When the Asset field is empty but World Fleet Aircraft (leaseworks__World_Fleet_Aircraft__c) has a value, then this field is initialized as World Fleet Aircraft->Lease End if that has a value, else as the 1st of July of the year from World Fleet Aircraft->Build Year.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically updated by the system based on the values in the fields Asset and New/Used?, as follows: 'New' => Asset->Date of Manufacture, 'Used' => Asset->Lease->Lease End Date. When the Asset field is empty but World Fleet Aircraft has a value, then this field is initialized as World Fleet Aircraft->Lease End if that has a value, else as the 1st of July of the year from World Fleet Aircraft->Build Year.
CustomField.label: Delivery Date
